---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Assemble
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Describe who is affected by this problem.

## Proposed Solution
Provide a detailed description of the feature or behavior you want to see.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, designs, flowcharts, or details that help explain your request.
